_comment: Aletheia Operational Efficiency manifest. flaring = real VIIRS Nightfire 2012-2024. lost (methane) = real TROPOMI 2019-2024. Other services pending real screening. Wasted-value money is shown ONLY on flaring (measured BCM x user price); venting stays relative (no measured volume). No invented thresholds, no tonnages, no '% of throughput'. Bands reflect estate-relative magnitude; trend reflects direction vs the site's own history.

value_basis.note: Wasted value = measured flared volume (VIIRS BCM) x bcm_to_mmbtu x the user's price. The conversion (~36 million MMBtu per BCM) varies a few % with gas heating value. Henry Hub is a reference price only; realized regional prices differ (e.g. Permian Waha trades below Henry Hub). This is a reference-price estimate of the value of gas burned, not a claim of recoverable revenue. Money is shown ONLY where a real flared volume exists; venting/methane has no measured volume and carries no dollar figure.

global_caveats: Flaring from EOG VIIRS Nightfire (2012-2024); the 2016→2017 step partly reflects a data-product change.
Methane from Sentinel-5P TROPOMI (2019-2024); ~5x7 km pixels cannot resolve a single facility — enhancement vs background only, never a leak rate or % of throughput.
'detected' for methane = excess exceeds 2x background spatial variability (a significance convention, not an emissions threshold).
Near-zero flaring is reported as an absolute state, never as a percentage (a percent on a near-zero baseline is meaningless).

estate.name: Permian (Delaware sub-basin)
estate.note: Heavy persistent flaring + significant basin methane

hero.title: Well-run — little to recover
hero.line: No flaring since 2018 and no methane enhancement above background across six years. The only operational lever is inspection displacement.

services.label: Flaring volume & frequency
services.trace: VIIRS 2012-2024: no detection within ~5 km of the facility since 2018; earlier minor flaring ceased.

services.label: Lost product / venting
services.trace: TROPOMI 2019-2024: facility at or below the local-ring background every year (−8 to −22 ppb); no excess detected.

services.label: Combustion efficiency
services.trace: Flare heat cross-referenced with co-located methane (interpretation layer — not yet enabled).

services.label: Throughput / activity
services.trace: NO₂/CO activity proxy vs the site's own baseline (not yet screened).

services.label: Inspection displacement
services.trace: Satellite pass substituting scheduled physical visits (not yet quantified).

services.label: Idle / underperforming
services.trace: Declared activity vs thermal + atmospheric signature (not yet assessed).

hero.title: Flaring & basin methane
hero.line: Persistent dense flaring across the basin plus a methane enhancement that is significant every year and rising. The largest efficiency-loss signal in the estate — basin-scale, not one facility.

services.label: Flaring volume & frequency
services.value: Persistent dense flaring (~30× estate); 2024 in line with own multi-year average
services.trace: VIIRS 2012-2024: dense multi-flare field across the AOI every year. Basin / multi-operator — not attributable to one operator.

services.label: Lost product / venting
services.value: Basin methane clearly elevated vs clean reference (~+20–25 ppb), significant every year, rising
services.trace: TROPOMI 2019-2024 basin method: Delaware basin above a distant clean reference all six years, clearing the 2σ bar every year. Basin-scale (not one facility); screening-grade, not a leak rate.

services.label: Combustion efficiency
services.trace: Per-flare combustion cannot be assessed at basin scale (not enabled).

services.label: Throughput / activity
services.trace: NO₂/CO activity proxy vs the site's own baseline (not yet screened).

services.label: Inspection displacement
services.trace: Satellite pass substituting scheduled physical visits (not yet quantified).

services.label: Idle / underperforming
services.trace: Declared activity vs thermal + atmospheric signature (not yet assessed).

hero.title: Worsening — flaring & methane both rising
hero.line: A small facility flare and a persistent methane enhancement, both increasing since 2019 and highest in 2024. Modest in absolute terms, but two independent signals trending the same way.

services.label: Flaring volume & frequency
services.value: Small but persistent flare, ~2× prior-years average; record high in 2024
services.trace: VIIRS 2012-2024: one facility flare detected in 19% of passes in 2012 rising to 67% in 2024.

services.label: Lost product / venting
services.value: Persistent methane above local background (~+15–25 ppb), rising; 2024 highest
services.trace: TROPOMI 2019-2024: facility consistently above its local ring; near the significance bar (clears 2σ in 1 of 6 years) — a real but modest, near-threshold signal. Screening-grade, not a leak rate.
